company.name: Allogene Therapeutics
company.subtitle: Off-the-shelf allogeneic CAR-T — ALPHA3 futility CLEARED (58% vs 16% MRD)

market.notes: 1L LBCL ~30K US + 25K EU/yr. MRD+ rate ~25% after R-CHOP = ~14K addressable patients. At $400K/dose, ~$1B peak revenue at 40% penetration. Post-futility 58% vs 16% MRD validates MRD-guided paradigm.

us.patientsK.note: SEER 2024: ~30K new DLBCL/yr US (largest aggressive NHL subtype); ~40K prevalent. Source: NCI SEER, LLS.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~38K DLBCL/yr; HMRN UK + GELA France registries.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~120K on-tx; APAC DLBCL rising per GLOBOCAN 2022.

us.wtpPct.note: ~68% -- R-CHOP baseline; Polivy+R-CHP 1L NCCN Cat 1; CAR-T 2L SOC; Epkinly/Columvi 3L+ covered.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~50% -- NICE + G-BA approved Polivy, CAR-T, bispecifics; rituximab biosim universal.

row.wtpPct.note: ~15% -- Japan PMDA + China NRDL full R-CHOP + Polivy; EM biosim R-CHOP.

us.priceK.note: Blended $195K: Polivy+R-CHP $175K (45% pts) + CAR-T 2L $460K (15%) + bispecific $250K (15%) + R-CHOP alone $40K (25%).

penPct.note: ~55% peak -- 1L Polivy + 2L CAR-T + 3L bispecific fill LOT ladder over 5yr.

us.reachPct.note: ALPHA3 1L LBCL MRD+ consolidation post-chemo; ~18K US LBCL/yr, ~40% MRD+; allo off-shelf vs Yescarta/Breyanzi autologous; launch 2027 ~20% reach.

us.priceK.note: ~$420K one-time course; Yescarta $424K + Breyanzi $410K WAC reference; allo pricing parity expected.

us.wtpPct.note: ~50% -- CAR-T DRG $500K+ precedent; off-shelf allo reduces vein-to-vein time; Medicare NTAP + commercial full CAR-T coverage.

eu.reachPct.note: ~15% EU5 LBCL 1L MRD+; EMA CAR-T hospital exemption pathway; NICE TA559 Yescarta precedent.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~25% -- NICE CDF entry for autologous CAR-T; off-shelf allo economics may accelerate access.

row.reachPct.note: ~8% ROW; Japan PMDA Yescarta 2021; China autologous CAR-T domestic players.

row.wtpPct.note: ~15% -- Japan NHI Yescarta/Kymriah reimb; China NRDL CAR-T limited to domestic.

market.notes: Severe refractory SLE ~30K US + similar EU. Dagger technology reduces/eliminates lymphodepletion — key safety differentiator. PoC data June 2026. Platform halo from ALPHA3 success.

us.patientsK.note: Lupus Foundation of America: ~300K US SLE; 90% female; African American 3x risk; CDC 2018 registry data.

eu.patientsK.note: EULAR SLE registry: ~350K EU27+UK; SLEDAI/BILAG severity scoring; ~30% lupus nephritis subset.

row.patientsK.note: Global ex-US/EU ~4M; Asia Pacific highest age-standardized prevalence; lupus nephritis more aggressive.

us.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- Benlysta (IV + SC) Medicare Part B/D; Saphnelo (anifrolumab) commercial; Lupkynis LN covered.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~38% -- EMA approved Benlysta/Saphnelo/Lupkynis; NICE restrictive; HCQ + MMF backbone standard.

row.wtpPct.note: ~10% -- HCQ + steroids + MMF/AZA generics dominate; Japan Benlysta reimbursed.

us.priceK.note: Blended $45K: Benlysta $40K + Saphnelo $65K + Lupkynis $90K (LN) + HCQ/MMF generic $3K backbone; rituximab off-label.

eu.priceK.note: ~$22K blended -- Benlysta net ~$25K + generic backbone; anifrolumab ~$40K net.

penPct.note: ~25% peak -- biologic cycle-through (Benlysta -> Saphnelo -> CAR-T pipeline); steroid-sparing driver.

us.reachPct.note: Dual CD19/CD70 allo CAR-T autoimmune basket (SLE, LN, SSc, IIM); Ph1 2025-26; ~330K US SLE + 75K SSc + 50K IIM; launch 2029 ~12% reach.

us.priceK.note: ~$350K course projected; discount to onco CAR-T given lymphodepletion-free profile; autoimmune value-based pricing.

us.wtpPct.note: ~40% -- autoimmune CAR-T nascent; Benlysta $40K + Saphnelo $40K baseline; off-shelf lymphodepletion-free advantage key for access.

eu.reachPct.note: ~10% EU5 autoimmune; EMA autoimmune CAR-T pathway undefined; NICE ultra-restrictive.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~18% -- EU autoimmune CAR-T HTA novel; German Hopital exemption growing.

row.reachPct.note: <5% ROW; Japan PMDA autoimmune CAR-T novel; China autoimmune CAR-T POC data strong but commercial pathway early.

market.notes: 31% confirmed ORR in high-CD70 ccRCC. Phase 1b enrollment complete. Partnership candidate. Option value.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~82K new RCC/yr US; ~25K advanced/metastatic on systemic tx. Source: NCI SEER 2024, KCA.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~95K new RCC/yr; ~30K on IO+TKI per EUROCARE.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~70K on-tx; rising incidence in APAC per GLOBOCAN 2022.

us.wtpPct.note: ~68% -- IO+TKI (Keytruda+Inlyta, Opdivo+Cabometyx) 1L SOC; NCCN Cat 1; Medicare + commercial broad.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~50% -- NICE approved pembro+axi + nivo+cabo; G-BA betraechtlich; sunitinib generic baseline for resource-limited.

row.wtpPct.note: ~16% -- Japan J-DPC covers IO+TKI; China NRDL toripalimab+axitinib; EM sunitinib generic.

us.priceK.note: Blended $215K: IO+TKI doublet $310K (55% pts) + TKI mono $110K (20%) + IO mono $180K (15%) + HIF-2a Welireg $240K (10%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$125K blended; EU net ~58% US; sunitinib generic ~$15K.

penPct.note: ~58% peak -- IO+TKI 1L saturated; belzutifan (VHL/HIF) + CTLA-4 combos extend; adj pembro (KEYNOTE-564) growing.

us.reachPct.note: CD70 allo CAR-T ccRCC post-IO+TKI; ~14K US 2L+ ccRCC; Ph1 TRAVERSE ORR 30% Sep 2024; competitive vs Fotivda/Belzutifan; launch 2028 ~10% reach.

us.priceK.note: ~$380K course; discount to hematology CAR-T; solid tumor CAR-T pricing novel.

us.wtpPct.note: ~40% -- IO+TKI SOC well-entrenched; solid tumor CAR-T first-mover premium but payor skepticism high.

eu.reachPct.note: ~8% EU5 ccRCC; EMA solid tumor CAR-T precedent nascent; NICE TKI+IO SOC entrenched.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~15% -- EU solid tumor CAR-T access TBD.

row.reachPct.note: <5% ROW; Japan PMDA solid tumor CAR-T very early.

mega_bear.narrative: Final ALPHA3 fails to confirm, platform concerns return
events: ✗ Final readout fails to confirm MRD benefit

bear.narrative: MRD benefit holds but durability questioned
events: ~ MRD benefit confirmed but PFS durability modest

psychedelic_bull.narrative: First scaled off-the-shelf CAR-T, category leader / M&A target

risks: Surrogate-to-PFS conversion risk (MRD is interim, not final endpoint)
Manufacturing scale at <$20K COGS unproven at volume
Cash runway to Q1 2028 — raise likely before pivotal readout
Competition: Caribou, Poseida, CRISPR allo-CAR-T programs

catalysts.title: ALPHA3 interim futility analysis MRD clearance
catalysts._rationale: Specific date confirmed for interim futility analysis from pivotal ALPHA3 trial
